settings.intro: Full control over toasts: mute, allow, rewrite and restyle notifications — and pull the detailed browser-console output into a readable log.
settings.enabledDesc: Master switch. When off, every toast passes through untouched.
settings.autoopenDesc: Pop the panel open whenever a new toast arrives.
settings.consoleCapture: Capture browser console into the Log
settings.consoleCaptureDesc: Toasts are terse; the full error details are usually printed to the console. This pulls those detailed lines into the Log tab.
settings.consoleMirrorDesc: Send each notification's full text out to the console.
settings.hint: Open the panel from the wand menu → Smart Notify, or with the button above. The panel is mobile-friendly and has tabs for the live Log, mute/allow/rewrite Rules, appearance & color Look options, plus More (capture console, anti-spam, import/export).
panel.title: Smart Notify
rules.emptyHint: Add a rule above or use the mute button in the log.
look.testToast: This is a Smart Notify test toast.
look.dragHint: Drag me where toasts should appear
more.captureToggle: Show browser-console output in the Log
more.captureHint: Toasts are often terse ("API error"); the full details are usually printed to the console. This pulls those detailed lines into the Log tab. Note: this captures the browser console only — the Termux/node server log lives in another process and can't be read from here.
more.mirrorHint: On PC this is the browser console; on phone it's the Termux/server log.
more.spamDedupe: Collapse identical toasts fired in a burst
more.spamGroup: Group repeats with a ×N counter (instead of dropping)
more.spamGroupHint: Identical repeats bump a counter on the existing log entry, like devtools — nothing is silently lost.
more.backupHint: Export/import rules + all settings as JSON.
toast.muteExists: A matching mute rule already exists.
toast.muted: Muted. Future matches will be hidden.
toast.needPattern: Enter a pattern or pick a specific type.
toast.rewriteNeedsPattern: Rewrite rules need a pattern to match.
